Case# vmnet_return_t.VMNET_BUFFER_EXHAUSTED

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.10+

```
case VMNET_BUFFER_EXHAUSTED
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/vmnet/vmnet_return_t/vmnet_buffer_exhausted#Discussion)

Indicates failure due to buffers being temporarily exhausted in the kernel.
